title: juncus × valbrayi
intro: Juncus × valbrayi, also known as Valbray's rush, is a hybrid plant species within the Juncus genus, often found in wetland environments. Valbray's rush has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is also believed to provide various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving coughs, and aiding in digestion. Valbray's rush can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and has been used in traditional medicine for centuries.
